tagline: Buffalo's Premier Swimming Pool Service & Maintenance Provider

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves an Accountant's
Precision
hero.subheadline: 716 Pool Service brings meticulous attention to detail to every pool in Western New York. From openings to closings and weekly care in between, we handle it all so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Every WNY Season
services.subtitle: From the first warm day in spring to the last leaf in fall, 716 Pool Service keeps your pool in perfect condition so you can enjoy every moment of the short Buffalo summer.

cards.title: Pool Openings
cards.description: Complete spring startup including safety cover removal, equipment dewinterization, deck cleaning, vacuuming, wall brushing, and water shocking to get you swim-ready fast.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough weekly service covering water chemistry testing, chemical balancing, floor vacuuming, surface skimming, and wall brushing to keep your pool crystal clear all season.

cards.title: Pool Closings
cards.description: Full winterization with line blowing, equipment protection for pumps, filters, and heaters, plus secure winter cover installation to survive the harsh WNY winter.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnostics and repair for pumps, filters, heaters, and all pool systems. Professional removal and installation to keep everything running efficiently.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Buying a home with a pool? Our detailed inspection covers equipment condition, structural integrity, and overall pool health so you know exactly what you're getting.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Precision water chemistry management that keeps your pool safe, clear, and comfortable. No red eyes, no skin irritation — just perfectly balanced water every time.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form with your pool details. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. Matt personally reviews every request.

steps.title: We Show Up & Deliver
steps.description: Our experienced crew arrives on schedule with everything needed. Thorough service, clear communication, and an accountant's attention to every detail.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — that's the 716 promise.

about.label: Why WNY Trusts 716 Pool Service
about.headline: From Spreadsheets to Sparkling Pools — Built on Precision
about.description: Founded by Matt Duve, a former accountant who traded balance sheets for balanced pool chemistry, 716 Pool Service brings a level of detail and reliability that's rare in the industry. Every chemical measurement is precise. Every appointment is on time. Every invoice is transparent. With over a decade of combined experience and a perfect 5-star rating across 58+ reviews, we've earned the trust of pool owners throughout Western New York.

features.title: Accountant-Level Precision
features.description: Matt's background in accounting means nothing gets overlooked. Every measurement, every chemical reading, every detail is tracked and verified.

features.title: No Contracts. Earn It Every Visit.
features.description: We don't lock you in. Our 5-star reputation is built on earning your trust with every single service call.

features.title: Honest, Transparent Pricing
features.description: No surprise charges, no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what you're paying for before we start — the accountant in Matt insists on it.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a custom quote for your pool. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing from a team that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We built our perfect 5-star rating by standing behind every job, and we're not about to stop now. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal — it's our standard.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For pool openings in spring, we recommend booking early as our calendar fills fast. Call us and we'll find a time that works for you.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. After each visit, you'll know exactly what was done and the current state of your water chemistry.

faqs.question: What areas in Western New York do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Clarence, Buffalo, and the greater Western New York area. If you're in the WNY region and have a pool, there's a good chance we can help. Just give us a call to confirm.

faqs.question: Can you inspect a pool before I buy a home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our homebuyer pool inspection is one of our most popular services. We assess equipment condition, structural integrity, and overall pool health so you can make an informed decision before closing.

faqs.question: What makes 716 Pool Service different from other companies?
faqs.answer: Our owner Matt Duve brings an accountant's precision to pool care — every chemical reading, every measurement, every detail is tracked meticulously. That's why we maintain a perfect 5.0-star Google rating with 58+ reviews.

testimonials.name: Jennifer J.
testimonials.text: We used this pool company for the first time this year for our pool opening and spring cleaning service, and we had a great experience from start to finish. Highly recommend 716 Pool Service.

testimonials.name: Christopher B.
testimonials.text: Just had my pool opened by 716 Pool Service. Excellent communication prior to appointment, very professional, knowledgeable about all aspects of pool service. Will absolutely use them again.

testimonials.name: Bernadette R.
testimonials.text: Very satisfied with 716 Pool Services. Matt and his crew are very thorough, dependable and professional. Pool is consistently well maintained. Couldn't ask for better service.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest pool care from a team that treats your pool like their own.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
